tool_args.raw_text: MONTHLY MEETING OF TRIBOROUGH BRIDGE AND TUNNEL AUTHORITY COMMITTEE February 24, 2025 1:30 p.m.
MONTHLY MEETING OF TRIBOROUGH BRIDGE AND TUNNEL AUTHORITY COMMITTEE March 24, 2025 1:30 p.m.

payload.description: Bridges and Tunnels Committee Meeting at 2 Broadway, 23rd Floor New York, NY 10004

tool_args.raw_text: President Sheridan provided an overview of the following TBTA legislative proposals: (1) addressing illegally overweight trucks using weigh-in-motion (WIM) technology; (2) allowing automated speed limit enforcement cameras in work zones; (3) enhancing worker protections against assault; and (4) expanding revenue recovery methods and law enforcement measures.

payload.claim_text: TBTA proposed four legislative proposals: (1) addressing illegally overweight trucks using weigh-in-motion (WIM) technology; (2) allowing automated speed limit enforcement cameras in work zones; (3) enhancing worker protections against assault; and (4) expanding revenue recovery methods and law enforcement measures.

tool_args.raw_text: TBTA has identified $25 million in budgetary savings as part of the broader MTA cost-reduction strategy. These savings include realigning expenses to reflect continued efficiencies from Open Road Tolling, adjusting budgets to 2024 actuals, and broader operational savings.

payload.claim_text: TBTA identified $25 million in budgetary savings through realigning expenses from Open Road Tolling efficiencies, adjusting budgets to 2024 actuals, and broader operational savings.

tool_args.raw_text: President Sheridan acknowledged the retirement of Vice President and Chief of Operations, Rich Hildebrand, after 25 years of distinguished service to TBTA, and announced the appointments of Romolo De Santis as C&D Senior Vice President and TBTA Chief Engineer; John Sterritt as Senior Vice President, Environmental, Health and Safety; and Felix Rivera as Vice President and Chief of Transportation, leading TBTA's Revenue Recovery Division.

payload.claim_text: President Sheridan announced the retirement of Rich Hildebrand and appointments of Romolo De Santis as C&D SVP and TBTA Chief Engineer, John Sterritt as SVP Environmental Health and Safety, and Felix Rivera as VP and Chief of Transportation leading Revenue Recovery Division.

tool_args.raw_text: Robert F. Kennedy Bridge Revenue Collection Rate March 2025: 91.7%

tool_args.raw_text: The Central Business District Tolling Program, which began collecting tolls on January 5, 2025
Central Business District Tolling Program

payload.description: CBD Tolling Program update reported to Bridges and Tunnels Committee

tool_args.raw_text: TBTA smoothly transitioned its officers, sergeants, and lieutenants from the Bronx-Whitestone and Throgs Neck Bridges to its other facilities. The MTAPD and New York State Police are actively patrolling and providing safety and security for the Bronx-Whitestone and Throgs Neck Bridges.

payload.claim_text: TBTA transitioned its officers from Bronx-Whitestone and Throgs Neck Bridges to other facilities; MTAPD and NY State Police now patrol those bridges.

tool_args.raw_text: TBTA is also pleased to welcome both the Nassau and Westchester County Police Departments to such efforts going forward.

payload.claim_text: Nassau and Westchester County Police Departments joined the multiagency toll violation enforcement taskforce going forward.

tool_args.raw_text: The following speakers commented during the public speakers' session: • Jason Anthony about digital license plates and congestion pricing. • Christopher D. Greif about congestion pricing and accessibility.

payload.claim_text: Public speakers Jason Anthony (digital license plates and congestion pricing) and Christopher D. Greif (congestion pricing and accessibility) addressed the February 2025 TBTA Committee meeting.

tool_args.raw_text: The following speakers commented during the public speakers' session: • Jason Anthony about congestion pricing, toll violation enforcement, and bridge safety. • Matty W. Buchys-Hyland about congestion pricing and bridge & tunnel signage. • Murray Bodin about traffic safety.

payload.claim_text: Public speakers at March 2025 TBTA Committee meeting included Jason Anthony (congestion pricing, toll enforcement, bridge safety), Matty W. Buchys-Hyland (congestion pricing, signage), and Murray Bodin (traffic safety).
